summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Admin Improvements. All 11 backend API tests passed. All 14 frontend UI tests passed. Features tested: Account Value column in Members table, Edit Member without LOT size, Simulate Member with real account data, Members pagination, Signals pagination, and Monthly Archive with accordion view.
passed_tests: Backend: GET /api/admin/members returns account_value for master_admin ✓
Backend: Account value calculation (deposits - withdrawals + profits) ✓
Backend: Members pagination params (page, limit) work ✓
Backend: Members pagination page 2 works ✓
Backend: GET /api/admin/members/{id}/simulate endpoint exists ✓
Backend: Simulate returns real account data (account_value, lot_size, total_profit, summary) ✓
Backend: GET /api/admin/signals/history returns paginated signals ✓
Backend: Signals history page navigation works ✓
Backend: GET /api/admin/signals/archive returns signals organized by month ✓
Backend: POST /api/admin/signals/archive-month archives inactive signals ✓
Backend: PUT /api/admin/members/{id} works without lot_size ✓
UI: Members table has 'Account Value' column header ✓
UI: Account Value shows correct values ($100.00 for test_user, $14521.62 for Master Admin) ✓
UI: Edit Member dialog has only 'Full Name' and 'Timezone' fields (NO LOT Size) ✓
UI: Simulate Member button (Play icon) visible for regular users ✓
UI: Simulate Member dialog shows Account Value ($100.00) ✓
UI: Simulate Member dialog shows LOT Size (0.10) ✓
UI: Simulate Member dialog shows Total Profit ($0.00) ✓
UI: Simulate Member dialog shows Total Trades (0) ✓
UI: Signal History has pagination controls (Page 1 / 2) ✓
UI: Signal History has Previous/Next page buttons ✓
UI: Monthly Archive button visible in Trading Signals header ✓
UI: Archive dialog opens with 'Monthly Signal Archive' title ✓
UI: Archive dialog shows accordion with 'January 2026' (12 signals) ✓
UI: Archive dialog has 'Archive Current Month's Inactive Signals' button ✓
critical_code_review_comments: Account Value column correctly visible only for super_admin/master_admin roles
Account Value calculation: deposits - withdrawals + profits (correct formula)
LOT Size correctly removed from Edit Member dialog (only Full Name and Timezone remain)
Simulate Member correctly calculates LOT Size as account_value / 980
Signal History pagination working with 10 signals per page
Monthly Archive organizes signals by month with accordion UI
All data-testid attributes properly implemented for testing
seed_data_creation: Used existing test_user with $100 account value for simulation testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Admin improvements fully tested and working. Key features: 1) Account Value column in Members table (visible to Super/Master Admin only), 2) Edit Member dialog has only Full Name and Timezone (LOT Size removed), 3) Simulate Member shows real account data with calculated LOT size (account_value / 980), 4) Members table has pagination, 5) Signal History has pagination (10 per page), 6) Monthly Archive with accordion view showing signals organized by month. All APIs are real (no mocks).
